fields.name: Status
fields.tooltip: Specifies a value that is copied from the corresponding field on the production order header.

fields.name: Prod. Order No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the related production order.

fields.name: Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the item that is to be produced.

fields.name: Variant Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the variant of the item on the line.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the value of the Description field on the item card. If you enter a variant code, the variant description is copied to this field instead.

fields.name: Description 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies an additional description.

fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the location code, if the produced items should be stored in a specific location.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 1 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 1, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 2 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 2, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Bin Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the bin that the produced item is posted to as output, and from where it can be taken to storage or cross-docked.

fields.name: Standard Task Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a standard task.

fields.name: Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity to be produced if you manually fill in this line.

fields.name: Finished Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies how much of the quantity on this line has been produced.

fields.name: Remaining Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the difference between the finished and planned quantities, or zero if the finished quantity is greater than the remaining quantity.

fields.name: Scrap %
fields.tooltip: Specifies the percentage of the item that you expect to be scrapped in the production process.

fields.name: Due Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the produced item must be available. The date is copied from the header of the production order.

fields.name: Production BOM No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the production BOM that is the basis for creating the Prod. Order Component list for this line.

fields.name: Routing No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the routing used as the basis for creating the production order routing for this line.

fields.name: Unit Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the cost of one unit of the item or resource on the line.

fields.name: Cost Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total cost on the line by multiplying the unit cost by the quantity.

fields.name: Reserved Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many units of this item have been reserved.

fields.name: Manual Scheduling
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the End/Due Dates on the production have been scheduled manually.

fields.name: Unit of Measure Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies how each unit of the item is measured, such as in pieces or tons. By default, the value in the Base Unit of Measure field on the item card is inserted. It will be changed if you switch Product BOM or Production BOM Version.

fields.name: Quantity (Base)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity for this entry, in base units of measure.

fields.name: Reserved Qty. (Base)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the reserved quantity of the item, in base units of measure.

fields.name: Starting Date-Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the entry's starting date and starting time, which is retrieved from the production order routing.

fields.name: Ending Date-Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the entry's ending date and ending time, which is retrieved from the production order routing.

fields.name: Qty. Put Away
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity that is put away.

fields.name: Production BOM Version Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the version code of the production BOM.

fields.name: Routing Version Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the version number of the routing.

fields.name: Planning Flexibility
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the supply represented by this line is considered by the planning system when calculating action messages.
